Imports System.IO
Imports System.Net
Imports System.Text
Imports Newtonsoft.Json

''' <summary>
''' Units API Module - Handles all unit/panel-related API calls
''' </summary>
Module Units

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get children for a parent panel, or parent for a child unit
    ''' Replaces: SELECT * FROM PD_tbl_parents_smt WHERE Parente=@Parente or Child=@Child
    ''' Endpoint: /Units/Array/GetChilds
    ''' Supports area/side-specific remapping when PartID, AreaID, and Side are provided
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function ArrayGetChilds(ByVal childOrParent As String, Optional ByVal partID As Integer? = Nothing, Optional ByVal areaID As Integer? = Nothing, Optional ByVal side As String = Nothing) As List(Of ChildInParent)

        Dim resultado As List(Of ChildInParent) = New List(Of ChildInParent)()

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "ChildOrParent", .Value = childOrParent})

        ' Add optional parameters for remapping support
        If partID.HasValue Then
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "PartID", .Value = partID.Value.ToString()})
        End If

        If areaID.HasValue Then
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "AreaID", .Value = areaID.Value.ToString()})
        End If

        If Not String.IsNullOrEmpty(side) Then
            ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "Side", .Value = side})
        End If


        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Units/Array/GetChilds", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of List(Of ChildInParent))(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Get locked units by serial number
    ''' Replaces: SELECT * FROM PART_UNITS_LOCKED WHERE SN=@SN
    ''' Endpoint: /Units/LockedUnits/Get
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function GetLockedUnits(ByVal sn As String) As List(Of LockedUnit)

        Dim resultado As List(Of LockedUnit) = New List(Of LockedUnit)()

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "sn", .Value = sn})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Units/LockedUnits/Get", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            resultado = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of List(Of LockedUnit))(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return resultado
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Add locked unit
    ''' Replaces: INSERT INTO PART_UNITS_LOCKED
    ''' Endpoint: /Units/LockedUnits/Add
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function AddLockedUnit(ByVal partNo As String, ByVal sn As String, ByVal controlId As Integer, ByVal comments As String) As Boolean

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "partNo", .Value = partNo})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "sn", .Value = sn})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "controlId", .Value = controlId})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "comments", .Value = comments})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Units/LockedUnits/Add", "POST", ParametersTransit)

        Return APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Delete locked units by SN and comment pattern
    ''' Replaces: DELETE FROM PART_UNITS_LOCKED WHERE SN=@SN AND Comments LIKE @Pattern
    ''' Endpoint: /Units/LockedUnits/Delete
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function DeleteLockedUnits(ByVal sn As String, Optional ByVal commentPattern As String = "AOI BAD%") As Boolean

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "sn", .Value = sn})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "commentPattern", .Value = commentPattern})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Units/LockedUnits/Delete", "DELETE", ParametersTransit)

        Return APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Check if array relationship exists
    ''' Replaces: SELECT Child FROM PART_UNITS_ARRAY WHERE Child=@Child
    ''' Endpoint: /Units/Array/CheckRelationshipExists
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function CheckArrayRelationshipExists(ByVal child As String) As Boolean

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "child", .Value = child})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Units/Array/CheckRelationshipExists", "GET", ParametersTransit)

        If APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200 Then
            Return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(Of Boolean)(APIResponse.Response)
        End If

        Return False
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Add array relationship (parent-child)
    ''' Replaces: INSERT INTO PART_UNITS_ARRAY
    ''' Endpoint: /Units/Array/AddRelationship
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function AddArrayRelationship(ByVal parent As String, ByVal child As String, ByVal sortNo As Integer) As Boolean

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "parent", .Value = parent})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "child", .Value = child})
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "sortNo", .Value = sortNo})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Units/Array/AddRelationship", "POST", ParametersTransit)

        Return APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Delete array relationship
    ''' Replaces: DELETE FROM PART_UNITS_ARRAY WHERE Child=@Child
    ''' Endpoint: /Units/Array/DeleteRelationship
    ''' </summary>
    Public Function DeleteArrayRelationship(ByVal child As String) As Boolean

        Dim ParametersTransit As List(Of URLInput) = New List(Of URLInput)()
        ParametersTransit.Add(New URLInput With {.Name = "child", .Value = child})

        Dim APIResponse As APIResponse = API_Call("/Units/Array/DeleteRelationship", "DELETE", ParametersTransit)

        Return APIResponse.ResponseCode = 200
    End Function

End Module

#Region "Data Classes"

''' <summary>
''' Child in Parent response (matches ChildsInParent from API)
''' </summary>
Public Class ChildInParent
    Public Property Parent As String
    Public Property Child As String
    Public Property IsGood As Boolean
    Public Property DefectCode As Integer
    Public Property IsRework As Boolean
    Public Property IsFromPanel As Boolean
    Public Property ParentStageID As Integer
    Public Property Comments As String
    Public Property ArrayPosition As Integer
End Class

''' <summary>
''' Locked Unit response (matches PartUnitsLocked entity from API)
''' </summary>
Public Class LockedUnit
    Public Property AutoId As Integer
    Public Property PartNo As String
    Public Property Sn As String
    Public Property TrnDate As DateTime?
    Public Property ControlId As Integer?
    Public Property Comments As String
    Public Property FacilityKey As Integer?
    Public Property Scrap As Boolean
    Public Property ScrapReason As String
    Public Property UserId As String
End Class

#End Region

﻿Imports System.ComponentModel.Design
Imports System.Configuration
Imports System.Data.SqlClient

Imports System.Globalization

Imports System.Net
Imports System.Net.Mail
Imports System.Security.Principal
Imports System.Web.Configuration
Imports System.Xml

Public Module ExService

    Private FTP_USERNAME As String = "username"
    Private FTP_PASSWORD As String = "password"

    Private Declare Auto Function LogonUser Lib "advapi32.dll" (ByVal un As String, ByVal domain As String, ByVal pw As String, ByVal LogonType As Integer, ByVal LogonProvider As Integer, ByRef Token As IntPtr) As Boolean

    Public Declare Auto Function CloseHandle Lib "kernel32.dll" (ByVal handle As IntPtr) As Boolean

    '--------------------------------------------------------
    Dim runningDate As DateTime = Now
    Dim AreaID As Integer = 1

    Public Function ServiceCode() As Boolean

        Try
            Net.ServicePointManager.SecurityProtocol = Net.ServicePointManager.SecurityProtocol Or Net.SecurityProtocolType.Tls12 Or Net.SecurityProtocolType.Tls12
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteToFile(ex.ToString)
        End Try

        Dim Result As Boolean = True
        WriteToFile("START: ")

        Dim executeCorrectly As Integer = 3
        Dim executeMessage = ""

        'BeAgent.Busy("Execute Start")

        runningDate = DateTime.Now

        ' Read StationID from file (creates with default 9999 if not exists)
        Dim ConfStationID As Integer = GetStationIDFromFile()

        If Environment.UserInteractive Then
            ConfStationID = 2
        End If

        Try

            ' =========================================================
            ' REFACTORED: Using API instead of direct SQL queries
            ' =========================================================

            ' Get AOI machines via API
            Dim aoiMachines As List(Of AOIMachineConfig)
            Try
                If ConfStationID > 0 Then
                    aoiMachines = AOI.GetMachinesByStation(ConfStationID)
                    WriteToFile($"API: Loaded {aoiMachines.Count} AOI machines for station {ConfStationID}")
                Else
                    aoiMachines = AOI.GetAllActiveMachines()
                    WriteToFile($"API: Loaded {aoiMachines.Count} active AOI machines")
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                executeCorrectly = 5
                executeMessage = "API Error: " & ex.ToString()
                WriteToFile("API Error getting AOI machines: " & ex.ToString)
                aoiMachines = New List(Of AOIMachineConfig)()
            End Try

            Dim sendMissingEmailSetup As Boolean = False

            Try
                If aoiMachines.Count > 0 Then
                    For Each aoimachine As AOIMachineConfig In aoiMachines

                        Dim FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS As String = aoimachine.PathGood
                        Dim FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS_PROCCESED As String = aoimachine.PathGoodSuccess
                        Dim FOLDER_WITH_BAD_RESULTS_OR_VERIFY_BY_OPERATOR As String = aoimachine.PathBad
                        Dim FOLDER_WITH_BAD_RESULTS_OR_VERIFY_BY_OPERATOR_PROCESSED As String = aoimachine.PathBadSuccess

                        Dim StationID As Integer = If(aoimachine.StationId, aoimachine.StationId, 0)
                        Dim Brand As String = If(aoimachine.Brand, "")
                        Dim AOIID As Integer = If(aoimachine.Aoiid, aoimachine.Aoiid, 0)

                        Dim ExtractorType As Integer = aoimachine.ExtractorType
                        Dim LookingValue As String = If(aoimachine.LookingValue, "")

                        'Verificamos si tiene tiket de NPI
                        Dim haveTicketNPI As Boolean = False

                        Dim dtBoardBarcodes As DataTable = New DataTable
                        dtBoardBarcodes.Columns.Add("Position", GetType(Integer))
                        dtBoardBarcodes.Columns.Add("Barcode", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodes.Columns.Add("Result", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodes.Columns.Add("Operator", GetType(String))

                        Dim dtBoardBarcodesDetails As DataTable = New DataTable
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("Position", GetType(Integer))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("Location", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("PinNumber", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("X", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("Y", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("DefectCode", GetType(String))
                        dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Columns.Add("UserResult", GetType(String))

                        haveTicketNPI = False

                        'CARGAR NUMERO DE PARTE CON PARTID AND NO POR PANEL (via API)
                        Dim partNumbersList As List(Of PartNumberInfo) = Parts.GetAllPartNumbers()
                        Dim dtPartnumbers_Availables As DataTable = ConvertListToDataTable(partNumbersList)

                        'BLOQUEOS DE AOI (via API)
                        Dim qualityStatusList As List(Of AOIQualityChangeStatus) = Parts.GetAOIQualityChangeStatus()
                        Dim dt_cirrefbad As DataTable = ConvertListToDataTable(qualityStatusList)

                        If ExtractorType = 34 Then '34 = PARMI Machine results to process via local path and push via API.

                            Dim Path As String = ""
                            Dim PathSuccess As String = ""

                            Path = FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS
                            PathSuccess = FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS_PROCCESED

                            Try
                                If Not IO.Directory.Exists(FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS) Then
                                    WriteToFile("ERROR: Directory does not exist or cannot be accessed: " & FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS)

                                    Continue For
                                End If

                                Dim files() As String = IO.Directory.GetFiles(FOLDER_WITH_GOOD_RESULTS, "*.csv")

                                If files.Length > 0 Then
                                    WriteToFile("Found " & files.Length & " files to process")
                                End If

                                For Each filePath As String In files

                                    dtBoardBarcodes.Rows.Clear()
                                    dtBoardBarcodesDetails.Rows.Clear()

                                    Try

                                        Dim SendMissingEmail As Boolean = False
                                        Dim mensaje As String = ""

                                        Dim strLines As String() = File.ReadAllLines(filePath) _
                                           .Select(Function(s) s.Trim()) _
                                           .ToArray()

                                        'Solo asegurar es valido
                                        If strLines.Length > 0 Then
                                            'OBTENER NUMERO DE PARTE

                                            If haveTicketNPI = False Then
                                                Dim line1 As String() = strLines(7).Trim.Split(",")

                                                Dim partNumberGRFormat6Digits As Boolean = False

                                                Dim found = dtPartnumbers_Availables.Select("PartNumber='" & line1(0).Substring(0, 3).Replace("_", "-") & "'")

                                                Try
                                                    found = dtPartnumbers_Availables.Select("PartNumber='" & line1(0).Substring(0, 13).Replace("_", "-") & "'")
                                                Catch ex As Exception

                                                End Try

                                                'No parte | Side | Qty
                                                If found.Length = 0 Then
                                                    'Try as GR...
                                                    found = dtPartnumbers_Availables.Select("PartNumber like '%" & line1(0).Substring(0, 5).Replace("_", "-") & "%' AND LEN(PartNumber) > 9", "partid desc")
                                                    If found.Length > 0 Then
                                                        partNumberGRFormat6Digits = True
                                                    End If
                                                End If


                                                If found.Length > 0 Then
                                                    'Obtener partID
                                                    Dim partid As Integer = found(0).Item("PartID")
                                                    Dim partNumber As String = found(0).Item("partNumber")

                                                    Dim cirRefLocked2 = dt_cirrefbad.Select("PartID='" & partid & "'")
                                                    Dim cirRefLocked As DataTable = New DataTable

                                                    If cirRefLocked2.Length > 0 Then
                                                        cirRefLocked = cirRefLocked2.CopyToDataTable
                                                    Else
                                                        cirRefLocked = dt_cirrefbad.Copy
                                                        cirRefLocked.Clear()
                                                    End If

                                                    WriteToFile(cirRefLocked.Rows.Count)

                                                    Dim sideid As String = "A"

                                                    If partNumberGRFormat6Digits Then
                                                        Try
                                                            sideid = line1(0).Substring(5, 1)
                                                        Catch ex As Exception

                                                        End Try
                                                    Else
                                                        If line1(0).Length > 13 Then
                                                            sideid = line1(0).Substring(13, 1)
                                                        End If
                                                        If sideid <> "A" And sideid <> "B" Then
                                                            sideid = line1(0).Substring(5, 1)
                                                            If sideid <> "A" And sideid <> "B" Then
                                                                sideid = "A"
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    End If


                                                    Dim quantityUnitsScanned As Integer = found(0).Item("ArrQty")

                                                    Dim counter As Integer = 0

                                                    ' =========================================================
                                                    ' REFACTORED: Using API for program counter management
                                                    ' =========================================================
                                                    Try
                                                        Dim programCounter As AOIProgramCounter = AOI.GetProgramCounter(AOIID, partid, sideid)

                                                        If programCounter IsNot Nothing AndAlso programCounter.AutoId > 0 Then
                                                            ' Program exists - increment counter
                                                            counter = programCounter.Counter + 1
                                                            Dim updateSuccess As Boolean = AOI.UpdateProgramCounter(AOIID, partid, sideid, counter)
                                                            If Not updateSuccess Then
                                                                WriteToFile($"API Warning: Failed to update program counter for AOIID={AOIID}, PartID={partid}, Side={sideid}")
                                                            End If
                                                        Else
                                                            ' Program doesn't exist - create with counter = 1
                                                            counter = 1
                                                            Dim createSuccess As Boolean = AOI.CreateOrUpdateProgram(AOIID, partid, sideid, quantityUnitsScanned, counter)
                                                            If Not createSuccess Then
                                                                WriteToFile($"API Warning: Failed to create program for AOIID={AOIID}, PartID={partid}, Side={sideid}")
                                                            End If
                                                        End If
                                                    Catch ex As Exception
                                                        WriteToFile($"API Error in program counter management: {ex.ToString()}")
                                                        counter = 1 ' Fallback to counter = 1
                                                    End Try

                                                    Dim codigoPanel As String = partid & "_pnl_" & AOIID & "_" & counter

                                                    For position As Integer = 1 To quantityUnitsScanned
                                                        dtBoardBarcodes.Rows.Add(position, codigoPanel & "_" & position, "PASS", "FALSE")
                                                    Next

                                                    'Fecha
                                                    Dim datetext As String = line1(5)
                                                    Dim horatext As String = line1(6)

                                                    Dim Fecha As DateTime = New DateTime(datetext.Substring(0, 4), datetext.Substring(4, 2), datetext.Substring(6, 2), horatext.Substring(0, 2), horatext.Substring(3, 2), horatext.Substring(6, 2))


                                                    ' Convert API response to DataTable for compatibility
                                                    Dim dtBardcodes As New DataTable()
                                                    dtBardcodes.Columns.Add("Parente", GetType(String))
                                                    dtBardcodes.Columns.Add("Child", GetType(String))

    Public Function GetShift(Dia As DateTime) As Integer
        If 1 = 1 Then
            Dim dfi = DateTimeFormatInfo.CurrentInfo
            Dim calendar = dfi.Calendar
            Dim semanasystema As Integer = calendar.GetWeekOfYear(Dia, dfi.CalendarWeekRule, DayOfWeek.Sunday)
            Dim dayofwk As Integer = Dia.DayOfWeek
            Dim none As Boolean = True
            '0 de domingo a 6 sabado
            If semanasystema Mod 2 = 0 Then
                none = False
            End If
            'Turno
            Dim shift As Integer = 1
            If dayofwk = 0 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk <= 3 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk < 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 Then
                shift = 1
            ElseIf dayofwk < 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk >= 4 And Dia.Hour >= 18 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk >= 4 And Dia.Hour >= 6 Then
                shift = 3
            ElseIf dayofwk > 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk = 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 And none = False Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk = 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 And none = True Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 And none = False Then
                shift = 1
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 And none = True Then
                shift = 3
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 And none = False Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 And none = True Then
                shift = 2
            End If

            Return shift
        Else
            Dim dfi = DateTimeFormatInfo.CurrentInfo
            Dim calendar = dfi.Calendar
            Dim semanasystema As Integer = calendar.GetWeekOfYear(Dia, dfi.CalendarWeekRule, DayOfWeek.Sunday)
            Dim dayofwk As Integer = Dia.DayOfWeek
            Dim none As Boolean = True

            If semanasystema Mod 2 = 0 Then
                none = False
            End If
            'Turno
            Dim shift As Integer = 1
            If dayofwk = 0 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk <= 3 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk < 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 Then
                shift = 1
            ElseIf dayofwk < 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk >= 4 And Dia.Hour >= 18 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk >= 4 And Dia.Hour >= 6 Then
                shift = 3
            ElseIf dayofwk > 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk = 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 And none = False Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk = 4 And Dia.Hour < 6 And none = True Then
                shift = 4
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 And none = False Then
                shift = 3
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 18 And none = True Then
                shift = 1
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 And none = False Then
                shift = 2
            ElseIf dayofwk = 3 And Dia.Hour < 24 And none = True Then
                shift = 4
            End If

            Return shift
        End If


    End Function

    Public Sub MergeMaterial(DT As DataTable, PartID As Integer, PanelSSN As String, Side As String)

        Dim mergeFromAOI As Boolean = False

        'GET PARTNUMBER
        Dim partidSideParameter() As SqlParameter = New SqlParameter() _
            {
                New SqlParameter("@AreaID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = AreaID},
                New SqlParameter("@PartID", SqlDbType.Int) With {.Value = PartID},
                New SqlParameter("@Side", SqlDbType.VarChar) With {.Value = Side}
            }

        ' Check if should merge at AOI via API
        Try
            mergeFromAOI = Parts.ShouldMergeAtAOI(PartID, Side, AreaID)
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteToFile("API Warning: Failed to check ShouldMergeAtAOI for PartID=" & PartID & ", Side=" & Side & ", AreaID=" & AreaID & ": " & ex.Message)
            mergeFromAOI = False
        End Try

        If mergeFromAOI Then

            Dim IsReadedCode As Boolean = True

            'GET PARTNUMBER via API
            Dim PartNumber As String = ""
            Try
                Dim partInfo As PartInfo = Parts.GetPart(partId:=PartID)
                If partInfo IsNot Nothing Then
                    PartNumber = partInfo.PartNumber
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                WriteToFile("API Warning: Failed to get PartNumber for PartID=" & PartID & ": " & ex.Message)
            End Try

            For Each rowSSN As DataRow In DT.Rows
                If rowSSN.Item("Barcode").ToString.Contains("_pnl_") Then
                    IsReadedCode = False
                End If
            Next

            If IsReadedCode Then

                'GENERATE A CODEMASTER.
                Dim contador As Integer = getMergeCounter(PartID)
                Dim dateTimeNow = DateTime.Now
                Dim jDate As String = String.Format("{0}{1}", dateTimeNow.ToString("yy"), dateTimeNow.DayOfYear.ToString("000"))
                Dim parenssn As String = PartNumber.Substring(3, 5) & "-" & jDate & contador.ToString("00000")

                For Each rowSSN As DataRow In DT.Rows
                    Dim position As Integer = rowSSN.Item("Position")
                    Dim Child As String = rowSSN.Item("Barcode")

                    ' Check if child relationship exists via API
                    Dim exists As Boolean = Units.CheckArrayRelationshipExists(Child)

                    If exists Then
                        ' Delete existing relationship via API
                        Dim deleteSuccess As Boolean = Units.DeleteArrayRelationship(Child)
                        If Not deleteSuccess Then
                            WriteToFile($"API Warning: Failed to delete array relationship for Child={Child}")
                        End If
                    End If

                    ' Add new relationship via API
                    Dim addSuccess As Boolean = Units.AddArrayRelationship(parenssn, Child, position)
                    If Not addSuccess Then
                        WriteToFile($"API Warning: Failed to add array relationship Parent={parenssn}, Child={Child}, SortNo={position}")
                    End If
                Next
            Else
                'SKIP 
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Public Function getMergeCounter(PartID As Integer) As Integer
        ' Use API to increment merge counter (handles auto-create if doesn't exist)
        Dim contador As Integer = Parts.IncrementMergeCounter(PartID)

        If contador = 0 Then
            WriteToFile($"API Warning: Failed to increment merge counter for PartID={PartID}")
        End If

        Return contador
    End Function

    Private Sub DownloadFile(fileUri As String, localPath As String, Optional EnableSSl As Boolean = False, Optional Passive As Boolean = True)
        Dim ftpRequest As FtpWebRequest = DirectCast(WebRequest.Create(fileUri), FtpWebRequest)
        ftpRequest.Credentials = New NetworkCredential(FTP_USERNAME, FTP_PASSWORD)
        ftpRequest.EnableSsl = EnableSSl
        ftpRequest.UsePassive = Passive
        ftpRequest.Method = WebRequestMethods.Ftp.DownloadFile

        Using ftpResponse As FtpWebResponse = DirectCast(ftpRequest.GetResponse(), FtpWebResponse)
            Using responseStream As Stream = ftpResponse.GetResponseStream()
                Using outputStream As FileStream = File.Create(localPath)
                    responseStream.CopyTo(outputStream)
                End Using
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub UploadFile(fileUri As String, localPath As String, Optional EnableSSl As Boolean = False, Optional Passive As Boolean = True)
        Dim ftpRequest As FtpWebRequest = DirectCast(WebRequest.Create(fileUri), FtpWebRequest)
        ftpRequest.Credentials = New NetworkCredential(FTP_USERNAME, FTP_PASSWORD)
        ftpRequest.EnableSsl = EnableSSl
        ftpRequest.UsePassive = Passive
        ftpRequest.Method = WebRequestMethods.Ftp.UploadFile

        Using fileStream As FileStream = File.OpenRead(localPath)
            Dim requestStream As Stream = ftpRequest.GetRequestStream()
            fileStream.CopyTo(requestStream)
            requestStream.Close()
        End Using
    End Sub

    Public Function FindThirdSlash(input As String) As Integer
        Dim count As Integer = 0
        For i As Integer = 0 To input.Length - 1
            If input(i) = "/"c Then
                count += 1
                If count = 3 Then
                    Return i
                End If
            End If
        Next
        Return -1 ' Return -1 if there is no third slash
    End Function

    Public Function FtpFileExists(ftpFileUri As String, user As String, pass As String) As Boolean
        Try
            Dim request As FtpWebRequest = DirectCast(WebRequest.Create(ftpFileUri), FtpWebRequest)
            request.Method = WebRequestMethods.Ftp.GetFileSize
            request.Credentials = New NetworkCredential(user, pass)
            Using response As FtpWebResponse = DirectCast(request.GetResponse(), FtpWebResponse)
                Return True
            End Using
        Catch ex As WebException
            Dim resp = TryCast(ex.Response, FtpWebResponse)
            If resp IsNot Nothing AndAlso resp.StatusCode = FtpStatusCode.ActionNotTakenFileUnavailable Then
                Return False
            Else
                Throw ' Otro error, re-lanzar para ser manejado arriba
            End If
        End Try
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Convert List(Of T) to DataTable
    ''' Helper function to convert API responses to DataTable format
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function ConvertListToDataTable(Of T)(ByVal list As List(Of T)) As DataTable
        Dim dt As New DataTable()

        ' Return empty DataTable if list is Nothing or empty
        If list Is Nothing OrElse list.Count = 0 Then
            Return dt
        End If

        ' Get properties of T
        Dim properties = GetType(T).GetProperties()

        ' Add columns based on properties
        For Each prop In properties
            dt.Columns.Add(prop.Name, If(Nullable.GetUnderlyingType(prop.PropertyType), prop.PropertyType))
        Next

        ' Add rows
        For Each item In list
            Dim row = dt.NewRow()
            For Each prop In properties
                Dim value = prop.GetValue(item, Nothing)
                row(prop.Name) = If(value, DBNull.Value)
            Next
            dt.Rows.Add(row)
        Next

        Return dt
    End Function

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Reads StationID from text file. Creates file with default value 9999 if it doesn't exist.
    ''' File location: C:\BeFirst\Services\AutoExtractAOI\stationid.txt
    ''' </summary>
    Private Function GetStationIDFromFile() As Integer
        Dim filePath As String = "C:\BeFirst\Services\AutoExtractAOI\stationid.txt"
        Dim defaultStationID As Integer = 9999
        Dim stationID As Integer = defaultStationID

        Try
            ' Create directory if it doesn't exist
            Dim directoryPath As String = Path.GetDirectoryName(filePath)
            If Not Directory.Exists(directoryPath) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(directoryPath)
                WriteToFile($"Created directory: {directoryPath}")
            End If

            ' Check if file exists
            If Not File.Exists(filePath) Then
                ' Create file with default value
                File.WriteAllText(filePath, defaultStationID.ToString())
                WriteToFile($"Created StationID file with default value {defaultStationID}: {filePath}")
                Return defaultStationID
            Else
                ' Read StationID from file
                Dim fileContent As String = File.ReadAllText(filePath).Trim()

                If Integer.TryParse(fileContent, stationID) Then
                    WriteToFile($"Read StationID from file: {stationID}")
                    Return stationID
                Else
                    WriteToFile($"Warning: Invalid StationID in file '{fileContent}'. Using default {defaultStationID}")
                    ' Overwrite with default value
                    File.WriteAllText(filePath, defaultStationID.ToString())
                    Return defaultStationID
                End If
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteToFile($"Error reading StationID file: {ex.Message}. Using default {defaultStationID}")
            Return defaultStationID
        End Try
    End Function


End Module
